description: Samelo — watch-to-earn on Celo. Custom commands for solo builder automation.

context.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind v4, Supabase, wagmi v3, viem v2

commands.commit: Read `git diff --staged` and propose a Conventional Commit message. Format: `type(scope): description`. If nothing is staged, stage all changes first. Show the message for approval before committing.
commands.pr: Read `git log` since last PR base, inspect changed files, and generate a PR title + description. Follow `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` structure. Include Architecture Notes if significant logic changed.
commands.review: Read the current diff or PR diff and perform a code review. Check for: security issues, missing error handling, contract constraint violations (UUPS storage layout, ECDSA oracle binding), test coverage gaps, and adherence to project conventions in AGENTS.md.
commands.changelog: Run `scripts/generate-changelog.sh` or read `git log` since last tag and generate a properly formatted CHANGELOG entry following Keep a Changelog format.
